title: GasTown town.toml manifest
description: Declarative topology manifest for a Gas Town instance (ADR-0001, ADR-0004). Parsed by town-ctl and written to Dolt desired_topology tables.

version.description: Manifest format version. town-ctl refuses to apply an unknown version.

includes.description: Glob patterns for per-rig TOML fragments resolved before Dolt write. Merge semantics defined in dgt-cfi.

rig.description: Array of rig definitions. Each rig is a Git repository + agent pool.

role.description: Global custom agent role definitions (ADR-0004). Roles are defined once here and opted into per-rig via [rig.agents].roles.

name.description: Unique slug identifier for this Gas Town instance.

home.description: Path to the Gas Town home directory. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

TownCostConfig.description: Town-level operational cost control parameters (ADR-0006). Controls Deacon's cost patrol behaviour, not the per-rig spend limits (which are declared in [rig.cost] and [defaults.cost]).

patrol_interval_seconds.description: How often Deacon runs the cost patrol query, in seconds. Must be >= 10 when set. Defaults to 300 (5 minutes) if absent.

TownAgents.description: Gas Town-level agents that run alongside gt.

RigDefaults.description: Default values inherited by every rig unless overridden.

mayor_model.description: Default Claude model ID for Mayor agents.

polecat_model.description: Default Claude model ID for Polecat agents.

max_polecats.description: Default maximum Polecat pool size per rig.

cost.description: Default daily budget policy inherited by every rig that has no explicit [rig.cost] block.

SecretsConfig.description: Secrets resolved by town-ctl at apply time. Values are env-var interpolation expressions. Never written to Dolt (ADR-0001, Decision 4).

file.description: Path to an external secrets TOML file (gitignored). Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

RigSpec.description: A single Gas Town rig: one Git repository and its agent pool.

name.description: Unique slug identifier for this rig. Used as the primary key in desired_rigs.

repo.description: Absolute path to the Git repository root. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

enabled.description: Whether this rig is active. A disabled rig causes the Surveyor to drain and stop all its agents.

formula.description: Scheduled Formula workflows for this rig.

cost.description: Per-rig daily budget policy. Overrides [defaults.cost]. Exactly one budget field must be set.

AgentConfig.description: Agent role configuration for a rig. Absence of a role field means that role is disabled. Role interdependency: witness=true requires mayor=true.

mayor.description: Enable the Mayor agent (long-lived human interface).

witness.description: Enable the Witness agent (Polecat supervisor). Requires mayor=true.

refinery.description: Enable the Refinery agent (merge queue, conflict resolution).

deacon.description: Enable the Deacon agent (health daemon, coordinates Dogs).

mayor_claude_md.description: Path to the Mayor's CLAUDE.md for this rig. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

roles.description: Names of custom [[role]] entries to activate on this rig. Each name must match a globally defined [[role]] with scope="rig". Town-scoped roles need no entry here.

FormulaRef.description: A scheduled Formula workflow attached to a rig.

name.description: Formula name, unique within the rig.

schedule.description: Cron schedule expression (5-field: min hour dom mon dow), e.g. "0 2 * * *".

RoleSpec.description: A custom agent role definition (ADR-0004). Stored in desired_custom_roles. Must not shadow a built-in role name (mayor, polecat, witness, refinery, deacon, dog, crew).

name.description: Unique slug identifier. Must not equal a built-in role name.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this role does.

scope.description: rig: per-rig opt-in required via [rig.agents].roles. town: active on every rig automatically.

lifespan.description: ephemeral: spawned per task, exits when done. persistent: long-lived process.

RoleIdentity.description: How the role presents itself as a Claude Code agent. Inline CLAUDE.md content is not supported — a file path is required (ADR-0004, Decision 2).

claude_md.description: Path to this role's CLAUDE.md file. Must resolve at apply time. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

model.description: Claude model ID for this role. Inherits from rig defaults if omitted.

RoleTrigger.description: When a custom role agent is spawned. Cross-field constraint: schedule requires trigger.schedule; event requires trigger.event.

type.description: bead_assigned: wakes when a Bead with assignee=<role-name> appears. schedule: cron-driven. event: CLAUDE.md polls for event Beads. manual: human triggers via Mayor Bead.

event.description: Event name to poll for (e.g. "pr-opened"). Required when type=event.

RoleSupervision.description: Where this role sits in the Gas Town agent hierarchy. Every custom role must declare a supervisor (ADR-0004, Decision 3).

parent.description: The built-in or custom role that supervises this one.

reports_to.description: Escalation target role. Defaults to parent if omitted.

max_instances.description: Maximum number of simultaneous instances of this role. Default 1.

CostPolicy.description: Daily spend limits for a rig (ADR-0006). Exactly one of daily_budget_usd, daily_budget_messages, or daily_budget_tokens must be set when this block is present. Cross-field mutual exclusion enforced by town-ctl.

daily_budget_usd.description: Maximum daily cost in US dollars. Mutually exclusive with daily_budget_messages and daily_budget_tokens.

daily_budget_messages.description: Maximum daily Claude API message count. Mutually exclusive with daily_budget_usd and daily_budget_tokens.

daily_budget_tokens.description: Maximum daily token count (input + output combined). Mutually exclusive with daily_budget_usd and daily_budget_messages.

warn_at_pct.description: Trigger a warning when budget usage reaches this percentage (1–99). Default: 80.
